title: Project Overview
content: Stock Analytics Platform is a modular web app built with Django REST Framework and React. It supports authenticated user flows for stock exploration, portfolio tracking, comparisons, risk analysis, forecasting, sentiment insights, commodities analytics, and BTC forecasting. The assistant is a read-only support layer that should guide users using project-grounded information.

title: Stocks Browser
content: The stocks module allows users to pick market and sector, then view sector stocks and live prices. It depends on catalog data seeded in PostgreSQL. If catalog seed data is missing on a server, sectors and stock lists can appear limited or unavailable. Stock catalog import can be done with seed_stocks_catalog management command.

title: Portfolio Features
content: Users can add and remove portfolio holdings and view risk and performance insights. Portfolio-related flows use authenticated endpoints and user-specific data. Comparison and portfolio forecast selectors rely on the portfolio stock list being available from backend APIs.

title: Compare Stocks Module
content: Compare Stocks is intended to compare two stocks from the logged-in user's portfolio. Dropdown options are fetched from portfolio-backed APIs, and the comparison chart should render normalized return series for selected symbols over a chosen range.

title: Forecast Module
content: Forecast module supports stock forecasting based on selected symbol, model, and horizon. Portfolio forecast option should list portfolio holdings. If no portfolio stocks are found, users may see empty selector states. Forecasting also depends on historical market data availability.

title: Gold and Silver Analytics
content: Commodities module fetches gold and silver time series and computes current price, prediction, and correlation. Upstream market data can intermittently fail, so fallback tickers and caching are used for reliability. If data providers fail consistently, UI should show a graceful data unavailable state.

title: Sentiment and Recommendations
content: Sentiment module aggregates finance news and computes sentiment scoring, and recommendations are generated from combined signals. External provider limits or missing API keys can reduce data availability. The application should handle these failures gracefully without crashing.

title: BTC Forecast Feature
content: Crypto module exposes BTC/USD hourly and range-based forecast views. Availability depends on external market data responses and forecasting pipeline readiness.

title: Authentication Basics
content: Login uses username/password and JWT-based authentication. The frontend sends access tokens and refreshes when needed. If tokens expire or become invalid, API requests can fail with unauthorized responses until refresh or re-login happens.

title: Forgot Password with OTP
content: Forgot-password flow in this project relies on mobile number and Telegram chat ID linkage. If a user is not found by the provided mobile value, request OTP fails. Environment configuration for Telegram services must be valid in server deployment.

title: FAQ: Given token not valid
content: If a protected page displays token validity errors, access token may be expired or missing. The expected recovery path is automatic refresh if refresh token exists, else re-login. This is an auth/session issue, not a commodities data issue.

title: FAQ: Data unavailable on server only
content: When local works but server shows data unavailable, common causes include missing seed/catalog imports, missing environment variables, outbound network restrictions for live market sources, or stale deployment state. Compare API responses and logs between local and server to identify the failing layer.

title: FAQ: Portfolio mismatch between pages
content: If portfolio list appears on one page but not another selector, verify both frontend modules read from the same backend portfolio endpoint and symbol mapping format. Mismatched source endpoints or stale cached data can cause empty dropdowns.

title: Important API Groups
content: Main API groups include auth, portfolio, stocks, comparison, risk, forecasting, sentiment, recommendations, commodities, crypto, and assistant. Assistant endpoint is POST /api/assistant/chat/. It should remain backward compatible for the existing frontend widget.

title: General FAQ: Platform Purpose
content:
Question: What is this platform used for?
Answer: This platform is used for stock analytics, portfolio tracking, forecasting, sentiment analysis, risk insights, commodities analysis, crypto forecasting, and assistant-based guidance.

title: General FAQ: Who Can Use The Platform
content:
Question: Who can use this platform?
Answer: Anyone with a registered account can use the platform to access its analytics and portfolio features.

title: General FAQ: Signup Requirement
content:
Question: Do I need to sign up before using the platform?
Answer: Yes, you generally need to create an account and log in before accessing the protected analytics workspace.

title: General FAQ: What Happens After Login
content:
Question: What can I do after logging in?
Answer: After logging in, you can browse stocks, manage your portfolio, compare stocks, view risk insights, run forecasts, analyze sentiment, check commodities, explore BTC forecasts, and use the AI assistant.

title: General FAQ: More Than Stocks
content:
Question: Is this platform only for stocks?
Answer: No, the platform also includes gold and silver analytics, BTC forecasting, and an AI assistant in addition to stock-related features.

title: General FAQ: Create Portfolio
content:
Question: Can I create my own portfolio here?
Answer: Yes, you can add stocks to your portfolio and use the platform to analyze them through different modules.

title: General FAQ: Stock Comparison Support
content:
Question: Does the platform support stock comparison?
Answer: Yes, the platform includes a stock comparison feature that helps compare two selected stocks using key performance indicators.

title: General FAQ: Risk Support
content:
Question: Can I check stock risk on this platform?
Answer: Yes, the platform provides risk categorization and portfolio risk breakdown features.

title: General FAQ: Forecasting Support
content:
Question: Does the platform offer stock price forecasting?
Answer: Yes, the platform includes forecasting tools for selected stocks and portfolio-based forecast insights.

title: General FAQ: Sentiment Support
content:
Question: Can I see news-based stock sentiment?
Answer: Yes, the sentiment module analyzes recent news related to a stock and provides an overall sentiment view.

title: General FAQ: Download Reports
content:
Question: Can I download reports from this platform?
Answer: Yes, the platform supports downloadable sentiment reports for selected stocks.

title: General FAQ: Market Sectors
content:
Question: Does the platform show market sectors?
Answer: Yes, stocks can be explored by market and sector for easier browsing and filtering.

title: General FAQ: Gold And Silver Analytics
content:
Question: Can I analyze gold and silver here?
Answer: Yes, the platform includes a dedicated gold and silver analytics section with trend and forecast information.

title: General FAQ: BTC Analysis
content:
Question: Does the platform support BTC analysis?
Answer: Yes, the platform provides BTC forecasting and historical trend analysis.

title: General FAQ: AI Assistant Availability
content:
Question: Is there an AI chatbot in the platform?
Answer: Yes, the platform includes an AI assistant that helps users navigate portfolio questions, comparisons, forecasts, sentiment, and more.

title: General FAQ: Beginner Friendly
content:
Question: Is this platform suitable for beginners?
Answer: Yes, the platform is designed to help both beginners and more advanced users explore market analytics through guided modules.

title: General FAQ: Monitor Holdings
content:
Question: Can I use this platform to monitor my holdings regularly?
Answer: Yes, the portfolio and analytics modules are useful for regularly monitoring your holdings and performance.

title: General FAQ: Live And Cached Data
content:
Question: Does this platform give only live data?
Answer: The platform primarily uses market data sources and cached analytics data depending on the feature and availability.

title: General FAQ: Analysis Versus Trading
content:
Question: Is this platform focused on analysis or trading?
Answer: This platform is focused on analysis, insights, and decision support rather than direct trading.

title: General FAQ: Main Benefit
content:
Question: What is the main benefit of this platform?
Answer: The main benefit is that it brings multiple financial analysis tools into one place, making it easier to study stocks, portfolios, risk, sentiment, commodities, and crypto from a single dashboard.

title: Project FAQ: Portfolio Stocks
content:
Question: What stocks are currently in my portfolio?
Answer: You can view all the stocks currently added to your portfolio in the Portfolio section, grouped by sector where applicable.

title: Project FAQ: Portfolio Sector Count
content:
Question: Which sector has the highest number of stocks in my portfolio?
Answer: The platform can summarize your portfolio by sector and identify the sector with the highest stock count.

title: Project FAQ: Portfolio Risk Breakdown
content:
Question: What is my current portfolio risk breakdown?
Answer: Your portfolio risk breakdown shows how many of your holdings are classified as low, medium, and high risk based on volatility analysis.

title: Project FAQ: Top Gainer
content:
Question: Which stock is my top gainer right now?
Answer: The system can identify the top gainer in your portfolio by comparing the latest price movement of your holdings.

title: Project FAQ: Top Loser
content:
Question: Which stock is my top loser right now?
Answer: The system can identify the top loser in your portfolio by checking which holding has the weakest recent percentage change.

title: Project FAQ: Compare Portfolio Stocks
content:
Question: Compare two stocks from my portfolio and tell me which is performing better.
Answer: The platform compares two selected stocks using return, volatility, normalized performance, and supporting insights to help determine which one is performing better.

title: Project FAQ: Specific Stock Analytics
content:
Question: Show me the analytics for a specific stock in my portfolio.
Answer: The platform can display stock analytics such as current price, PE ratio, intrinsic value estimate, discount percentage, and price history.

title: Project FAQ: PE Ratio Comparison
content:
Question: What is the PE ratio comparison across my portfolio stocks?
Answer: The PE comparison view shows the PE ratios of your portfolio stocks and calculates an average PE ratio for the portfolio where data is available.

title: Project FAQ: Stock Forecast
content:
Question: Forecast the price of a selected stock for the next 3 months.
Answer: The forecasting module can generate a projected price path for a stock using supported forecasting models and selected horizons such as 3 months.

title: Project FAQ: Portfolio Next-Day Forecast
content:
Question: What is the average next-day forecast for my portfolio?
Answer: The portfolio forecast feature calculates forecasts for your portfolio holdings and returns an average predicted value for the next day.

title: Project FAQ: Search Stocks
content:
Question: Search for a stock by symbol or company name.
Answer: The stock search feature lets you search by stock symbol or company name and returns matching results from the stock reference database.

title: Project FAQ: Stocks By Market And Sector
content:
Question: Show me stocks by market and sector.
Answer: The Stocks page allows you to browse stocks by market first and then by sector, with live-priced entries where available.

title: Project FAQ: Risk List Categories
content:
Question: Which stocks in the risk list are categorized as low, medium, or high risk?
Answer: The risk list shows stocks along with their price and assigned risk category so you can quickly filter or review them.

title: Project FAQ: Sentiment Analysis
content:
Question: Analyze the recent news sentiment for a stock.
Answer: The sentiment module can analyze recent stock-related news and classify the overall sentiment as positive, neutral, or negative.

title: Project FAQ: Sentiment Report Download
content:
Question: Generate and download a sentiment report for a stock.
Answer: The platform can generate a downloadable PDF sentiment report based on recent news and sentiment analysis for the selected stock.

title: Project FAQ: Recommendations
content:
Question: What recommendations do you have for top and bottom stocks right now?
Answer: The recommendations module provides ranked top and bottom stock suggestions using sentiment and short-term trend signals.

title: Project FAQ: Gold And Silver Insights
content:
Question: Show me the gold and silver analytics with forecast insights.
Answer: The commodities section provides gold and silver analytics, converted pricing views, and forecast insights for selected horizons.

title: Project FAQ: Gold Silver Correlation
content:
Question: What is the current correlation between gold and silver?
Answer: The correlation section shows how closely gold and silver prices are moving together over the selected analysis period.

title: Project FAQ: BTC Forecast
content:
Question: Show me the BTC forecast for 3 months, 6 months, or 1 year.
Answer: The BTC module provides historical trend analysis and projected outlooks for different time ranges such as 3 months, 6 months, and 1 year.

title: Project FAQ: Assistant Capabilities
content:
Question: What can the AI assistant help me do inside this platform?
Answer: The AI assistant can help with portfolio questions, holdings summaries, sector distribution, stock comparison, forecasting, sentiment, commodities, and BTC-related guidance based on platform data.

title: App Usage FAQ: Logout
content:
Question: How do I logout?
Answer: You can log out by clicking the Logout button in the sidebar navigation.
